summary: - **Status:** synthesis revision, **ANALYSIS ONLY** (Fable, lead scientist, 2026-07-15). This document supersedes `docs/next/feasibility-synthesis-v7.md` (and through it v6) as the standing programme-level feasibility picture **once the coordinator commits it**. It is v7 with (a) the eight corrections of the GPT-5.6 dual-model co-read applied (`poc/gpt56-review/v7-coread/last-message.json`, bottom line **ADOPT WITH corrections**; both verdict-words confirmed) and (b) the post-v7 window folded in
title: Cross-experiment feasibility synthesis v8 — v7 revised per the GPT-5.6 co-read (ADOPT WITH corrections): ledger recast by evidence type, R4 restated as not-demonstrated-at-margin, and the post-v7 window folded in
